title: Policies granting access to all resources of an account are security sensitive
description: This rule identifies policies that grant access to all resources of an account, which can lead to unintended data access or unauthorized actions.
message: Policy grants access to all resources of an account
recommendation: Limit policy access to specific resources

noncompliant.description: This policy grants access to all resources of an account

compliant.description: This policy grants access to resource1 for user1, but not all resources

why_is_this_an_issue: Unrestricted access to all resources can lead to data breaches, unauthorized actions, and other security incidents.
how_to_fix: Limit policy access to specific resources and users with the least privilege necessary.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if a policy grants access to all resources of an account (e.g., '*')

metadata.title: Policies granting access to all resources of an account are security sensitive
